motion.name: transition-standard
motion.purpose: Transitions for hover and scale effects.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Large gradient button for main CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #8b5cf6); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(59,130,246,0.25); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(59,130,246,0.25); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 20px; background: transparent; color: #3b82f6; border: 1.5px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.4); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); border-color: #3b82f6; transform: translateY(-1px); }

narrative.overview: The Compliance Shell visual language evokes immediate security, legal authority, and technological peace of mind. Designed for WooCommerce store owners facing audits, the system pairs a cyber-security dark-indigo backdrop with vibrant primary indicators (tech-blue/purple gradients) and high-visibility warning indicators (amber and hazard-red).
keyCharacteristics: Deep Indigo background (#0a0e1a) with crisp borders.
Cyber-security grade blue-violet gradients indicating modern technology.
Warning accents in amber (#f59e0b) to flag urgency and compliance failures.

rules.name: The Hazard Contrast Rule
rules.body: Warning colors (Amber or Danger Red) are reserved for risk panels and urgency tags. Never use them as general branding or backgrounds.

rules.name: The No-Faint-Text Rule
rules.body: Body copy must maintain a contrast ratio of >= 4.5:1. Faint-gray body text on dark surfaces is strictly prohibited.

rules.name: The Distinctive Pairing Rule
rules.body: Pair Manrope (for geometric display titles) with Work Sans (for clean, highly readable body copy). Do not mix other sans-serif families.

dos: Do maintain a strict 12px border radius for buttons and inputs, and 20px for cards.
Do use OKLCH tints for gradients to keep them bright and prevent muddy mid-points.
Do test forms with screen readers and keyboard navigation (tabbing order).
donts: Don't use border-left / border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use SaaS cream templates (#faf7f2 bg) for a cyber-security compliance product.
Don't let letter-spacing on display headers fall below -0.04em.
Don't pair a soft drop-shadow with a 1px border on the same resting element (use border only).
